step_by_step_reasoning: The World Model identifies 10 main entities: Dev (the developer), CodePipeline, CodeCommit, CodeBuild, Registry (ECR), CloudFormation, VPC, ECS, IAM, and ALB. The workflow begins with the Dev pushing code to CodeCommit. CodeCommit then triggers CodeBuild, which builds the application code and pushes the Docker container image into Registry (ECR). For deployment, CloudFormation is utilized to provision the application infrastructure (VPC, ECS, IAM, ALB) in parallel environments. We map these nodes and register only the visual connections specified: Dev to CodeCommit, CodeCommit to CodeBuild, CodeBuild to Registry, and CloudFormation to VPC.

graph.name: Etion Automated Infrastructure and Application Deployment Pipeline
graph.notes: This architecture automates infrastructure provisioning and application deployment for Etion's multi-customer environment. A developer pushes code changes to CodeCommit, triggering CodeBuild to compile and upload the Docker image to Amazon ECR. CloudFormation templates are then executed to configure and spin up application instances consistently across multiple isolated customer VPCs with embedded approval workflows using Change Sets.

nodes.name: Dev
nodes.notes: The developer actor who writes and commits the application and infrastructure code.

nodes.name: CODEPIPELINE
nodes.notes: Orchestrates the continuous integration and deployment stages.

nodes.name: CODECOMMIT
nodes.notes: Source control repository where developers push code changes.

nodes.name: CODEBUILD
nodes.notes: Builds the application code into a container image.

nodes.name: REGISTRY
nodes.notes: Stores the built Docker container images ready for deployment.

nodes.name: CLOUDFORMATION
nodes.notes: Provisions and configures AWS infrastructure using templates.

nodes.name: VPC
nodes.notes: Isolated virtual network environment containing the deployed workloads.

nodes.name: ECS
nodes.notes: Runs the containerized applications inside the VPC.

nodes.name: IAM
nodes.notes: Defines access control and execution roles for deployed application resources.

nodes.name: ALB
nodes.notes: Application Load Balancer directing traffic to ECS tasks.

edges.notes: Developer commits code changes directly into CodeCommit.
Changes in CodeCommit trigger the build phase in CodeBuild.
CodeBuild uploads the completed container image to Amazon ECR (labeled REGISTRY).
CloudFormation template execution provisions and updates resources inside the target VPC.
